hard_stops.logic: project must be initialized before any government relations activities begin
lobbying activities exceed registration threshold without registration — federal or state lobbying disclosure violation
contribution or expenditure triggers pay-to-play restrictions — SEC Rule 206(4)-5 or state/local equivalent violation

soft_flags.logic: public hearing or planning commission meeting is less than 14 days away — preparation materials needed
community opposition score exceeds 7 out of 10 — proactive outreach and engagement strategy recommended
government incentive application deadline is within 30 days — action required to preserve financial benefit
